title: Chococraft x Xaero's Minimap
description: Adds Chococraft compatibility to Xaero's Minimap
body: Adds [Chococraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/chococraft) compatibility to [Xaero's World Map]([https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)). Icons are taken from _Final Fantasy I & II: Dawn of Souls_ and recolored to match each variant.
